creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Fernando,

since this ticket is old i assume, that you already fixed the problem. The correct solution was already suggested: using the -o option.

I did a test for your case by checking out an old source-tree and build math/mate-calc. After an update to the newest version i could reproduce your problem.

The following statement fixes your problem and make the update processing correctly:
portmaster -o math/galculator math/mate-calc

So this is not a bug; therefore i am closing this Ticket.

Greetings,
Torsten
